# Kaaval

> A self-hosted Kubernetes security scanner that tracks Roles, ClusterRoles, and bindings against CIS Kubernetes Benchmark controls, calculating contextual risk and presenting clear remediation actions.

## Quickstart

```bash
git clone https://github.com/kaaval/kaaval.git
cd kaaval
make setup-dev
make scan
```

## Key files

- [README](README.md) — Main landing page.
- [docs/contextual-risk-score.md](docs/contextual-risk-score.md) — Explanation of the contextual risk calculation formula.
- [docs/rbac-rules.md](docs/rbac-rules.md) — Full catalog of RBAC security scanner checks.
- [docs/ci-integration.md](docs/ci-integration.md) — Recipes for GitLab, GitHub Actions, Jenkins, and Argo CD.
